videos.headline: Tony Muskett finds Malik Washington for a Virginia TD
videos.description: Tony Muskett hits Malik Washington in stride for a Cavaliers touchdown.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Tony Muskett finds Malik Washington for a Virginia TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Malachi Fields climbs the ladder for an incredible TD grab
videos.description: Tony Muskett heaves one into the end zone as Malachi Fields climbs the ladder for an incredible 39-yard Virginia TD.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Malachi Fields climbs the ladder for an incredible TD grab) 2023/09/30 ESHEET

videos.headline: Lewis Bond breaks free for a Boston College TD
videos.description: Lewis Bond goes to the outside for a touchdown to give Boston College its first lead of the game.

tracking.trackingName: NCF_One-Play (Lewis Bond breaks free for a Boston College TD) 2023/09/30 ESHEET
